creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks for investigating this, and sorry that it took so long to reply here :-(

I did a full PyQt4 build here with the API option turned off, and fortunately there were problems only in devel/py-qt4-core, devel/py-qt4-test and databases/py-qt4-sql. I've fixed py-qt4-test and py-qt4-sql in area51, and py-qt4-core should follow soon. The problem with -core is a bit simpler though: it shouldn't depend on QtXml, it's PyQt 4.10.3 that started building pylupdate and pyrcc regardless of whether QtXml is enabled. patch-configure.py needs to be regenerated to make the build conditional again.
